behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names semantic_index.rs, scope.rs, ide_support.rs, is_scope_reachable, is_range_reachable, reachability field, ancestor_scopes iterator, and the cargo check/clippy/test/fmt commands all tested.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what is redundant and what API to use (ancestor_scopes) but does not dictate exact code changes line-by-line.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for absence of is_scope_reachable/reachability field and presence of ancestor_scopes, plus compilation and tests passing — alternative correct fixes satisfying these constraints would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute cargo check, clippy, test, fmt subprocesses in addition to grep-based static checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests combined with cargo check/test ensure the code still compiles and passes tests; a stub would fail cargo build since removing the field requires updating builder.rs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each requirement (removal of method, removal of field, use of ancestor_scopes, ide_support update, cargo cleanliness) has corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments for fail-to-pass and pass-to-pass with tagged headers.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code refactoring, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files but these are the domain of the task; no specific line numbers given.
